name: Snack Poll
description: Vote for your favorite half-time snack and watch a live bar chart update.
features: Four snack options; one vote per user enforced client-side
Live recharts bar chart computed from the shared votes collection
Chart themed to the Toybox palette (candy bars, ink axes)
Vote count and 'one per person' note under the chart

collections.name: votes
collections.writtenWhen: the user taps a snack option

ui.layout: single card with option buttons above a chart

acceptance: Tapping an option inserts a vote doc and disables further voting for that user
The bar chart reflects counts reduced from collection('votes').list()
The user's own choice is visually marked
Bars use the Toybox candy colors, not default recharts blue
